hooks.command: file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty') && base=$(basename "$file") && [[ "$base" == ".env" ]] && echo 'BLOCKED: Cannot edit .env files directly — use .env.example instead' && exit 1 || true

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == */web/src/*.ts* || "$file" == */web/src/*.css ]] && dir=$(git -C "$(dirname "$file")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && npx --prefix "$dir/web" prettier --write "$file" 2>/dev/null || true

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty') && [[ "$file" == *.go ]] && dir=$(git -C "$(dirname "$file")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && cd "$dir" && go vet ./$(dirname "${file#$dir/}")/... 2>&1 | head -5 || true
